properties.summary: Mass Audubon works to protect the nature of Massachusetts for people and wildlife through conservation, education, and advocacy. They manage wildlife sanctuaries, engage in community science, and advocate for conservation policies.

properties.name: Rockport Conservation Commission
properties.summary: The Rockport Conservation Commission is responsible for protecting the town's natural resources, implementing the Massachusetts Wetlands Protection Act, and managing local lands dedicated to conservation and passive recreation.

properties.name: Rockport Garden Club
properties.summary: The Rockport Garden Club, established in 1928, is dedicated to the protection of native plants and wildlife, civic planting and beautification, community service, and promoting cooperative work in ecology and conservation.

properties.name: Massachusetts Audubon Society - Ipswich River Wildlife Sanctuary
properties.summary: Ipswich River Wildlife Sanctuary, part of the Massachusetts Audubon Society, offers programs and activities focused on conservation, education, and community engagement in a diverse natural setting.

properties.name: Rocky Neck Art Colony
properties.summary: The Rocky Neck Art Colony is a community organization that supports innovation in the arts, nurtures excellence, and celebrates the artistic history and culture of Rocky Neck. It provides opportunities for educational and professional development in the arts.

properties.name: Gloucester Conservation Commission
properties.summary: The Gloucester Conservation Commission administers the Massachusetts Wetlands Protection Act, Rivers Protection Act, and the local Gloucester Wetlands Ordinance to protect public interests including water supplies, local flora and fauna, and areas for passive recreation. It also works to prevent flooding, erosion, and pollution of wetlands and waterways.

properties.name: Essex County Greenbelt Association

properties.name: Massachusetts Climate Action Network (MCAN)

properties.name: Conservation Law Foundation
